title: "Femblaze" | ha ha the blazes are now AustonBluBoy
description: Auston was drawing something and he did something that make me think he looked like a blaze, so I edited the blaze texture to be him. He said "femblaze" so that's what I am calling it.  The pack works in pretty much any version since it's just the blaze texture that is changed.
body:
Auston was drawing something and he did something that make me think he looked like a blaze, so I edited the blaze texture to be him. He said "femblaze" so that's what I am calling it.

The pack works in pretty much any version since it's just the blaze texture that is changed.
